query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_services,
  SUM(monthlyCost) AS total_monthly_cost,
  SUM(monthlyCost) * 12 AS total_annual_cost,
  AVG(monthlyCost) AS avg_monthly_cost,
  MIN(monthlyCost) AS min_monthly_cost,
  MAX(monthlyCost) AS max_monthly_cost,
  SUM(retailPrice) AS total_monthly_retail,
  SUM(retailPrice) * 12 AS total_annual_retail,
  SUM(retailPrice - monthlyCost) AS total_monthly_margin,
  SUM(retailPrice - monthlyCost) * 12 AS total_annual_margin
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination');
